summary: Iteration 66: Browser Timezone and Language Fraud Prevention - ALL TESTS PASSED (17/17). Tested: 1) POST /api/enrollment/{id}/checkout accepts browser_timezone and browser_languages fields, 2) Pricing logic includes timezone_india check in security.checks, 3) Asia/Kolkata and Asia/Calcutta recognized as Indian timezones, 4) Non-Indian timezone blocks INR pricing when combined with other checks, 5) Frontend handleCheckout and verifyOtp send browser_timezone and browser_languages.
critical_code_review_comments: enrollment.py lines 99-100: EnrollmentSubmit model correctly has browser_timezone: Optional[str] and browser_languages: Optional[list] fields
enrollment.py lines 365-366: timezone_is_india check correctly validates browser_tz in ('Asia/Kolkata', 'Asia/Calcutta', '') - empty string passes
enrollment.py line 373: timezone_india included in checks dict with other fraud prevention fields
enrollment.py lines 493-498: Checkout correctly stores browser_timezone and browser_languages in MongoDB enrollment document
enrollment.py lines 500-504: get_enrollment_pricing called with browser_timezone and browser_languages parameters
EnrollmentPage.jsx lines 517-519: verifyOtp sends browser_timezone (Intl.DateTimeFormat) and browser_languages (navigator.languages) for free enrollment
EnrollmentPage.jsx lines 539-541: handleCheckout sends browser_timezone and browser_languages in checkout payload
context_for_next_testing_agent: Browser timezone fraud prevention is fully implemented. The GET /api/enrollment/{id}/pricing endpoint now returns security.checks with 5 fields: ip_is_india, claimed_india, no_vpn, phone_consistent, timezone_india. When browser_timezone is empty or 'Asia/Kolkata' or 'Asia/Calcutta', timezone_india=True. Non-Indian timezones like 'America/New_York' set timezone_india=False which blocks INR. Test environment IP is US-based so ip_is_india will always be False (expected).

enrollment_submit_model_fields.browser_timezone_field: PASS - Optional[str] field accepts timezone strings
enrollment_submit_model_fields.browser_languages_field: PASS - Optional[list] field accepts language arrays

pricing_timezone_check.all_5_checks_present: PASS - ip_is_india, claimed_india, no_vpn, phone_consistent, timezone_india
pricing_timezone_check.inr_eligible_logic: PASS - inr_eligible=True only when ALL checks pass

timezone_validation_logic.asia_kolkata_recognized: PASS - Asia/Kolkata timezone passes India check
timezone_validation_logic.asia_calcutta_recognized: PASS - Asia/Calcutta timezone passes India check
timezone_validation_logic.empty_string_passes: PASS - Empty timezone defaults to True (not penalized if not sent)
timezone_validation_logic.non_indian_timezone_blocks: PASS - Non-Indian timezones (e.g., America/New_York) set timezone_india=False

mongodb_storage.browser_fields_stored: PASS - browser_timezone and browser_languages stored in enrollment document on checkout

frontend_integration.verifyOtp_sends_browser_fields: PASS - Free enrollment checkout also sends browser fields

note: Test environment IP is US-based (Kubernetes cluster), so ip_is_india will always be False and INR pricing will never be fully eligible from tests. This is expected behavior - the fraud prevention is working correctly by blocking INR for non-Indian IPs.
